basic_details.job_title: One Stop Centre Mayabunder Security Guard/Night Guard Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: One Stop Centre Mayabunder has released the official Security Guard/Night Guard Notification 2026 at Andaman and Nicobar Administration Official Website. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced under the OSC Mayabunder Security Guard/Night Guard Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates aged up to 40 years with a qualification of 12th pass and relevant experience can apply offline up to 15 May 2026. The official notification PDF and application details are available below.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

qualification.details: Minimum two years of experience of working as a Security Guard in a Government or reputed organization at the District/State level. Preference will be given to a retired military/Paramilitary personnel.

selection_process: Verification of applications List of eligible candidates will be displayed Interview
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for One Stop Centre Mayabunder Security Guard/Night Guard Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: www.andaman.nic.in. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 15-05-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the One Stop Centre Mayabunder Security Guard/Night Guard recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to receive applications for the Security Guard/Night Guard posts is 15 May 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address by this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the eligibility criteria for the Security Guard/Night Guard post?
faq.answer: Candidates must have a minimum of two years of experience as a Security Guard in a government or reputed organization. Retired military or paramilitary personnel are preferred.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Security Guard/Night Guard position is 40 years.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Security Guard/Night Guard position?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a salary of Rs. 10,000/- per month for the Security Guard/Night Guard posts.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Security Guard/Night Guard post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies announced for the Security Guard/Night Guard position in One Stop Centre Mayabunder.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to send their applications via post.

faq.question: Q7. What is the educational qualification required?
faq.answer: While the summary mentions 12th pass, the detailed eligibility focuses on experience. It is advisable to check the official notification for precise educational requirements.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Security Guard/Night Guard role?
faq.answer: The selection process involves verification of applications, followed by the display of eligible candidates, and finally an interview.

faq.question: Q9. Where should I send the application form?
faq.answer: The application should be sent to The Central Administrator, "Mission Shakti"- One Stop Centre, O/o the Deputy Commissioner, Near Old Zonal Library, Mayabunder, North & Middle Andaman District, 744204.

faq.question: Q10. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee has been mentioned in the official notification for the Security Guard/Night Guard recruitment.
